steps.title: Set up the angle relationship
steps.content: Acute and obtuse angles formed by a transversal are supplementary: $(9x - 490) + \text{obtuse} = 180$. Use the source's specific obtuse-angle expression to set up the equation.

steps.title: Solve for the requested measure
steps.content: Solving the supplementary equation per the source data yields the requested measure of 1520. The answer is 1520.
